# viettelidc_vdbs_security_group (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC VDBS Security Group by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Tra cá»©u Security Group
data "viettelidc_vdbs_security_group" "db_sg" {
  name = "trove_sg-842c8d8a-57bd-4350-a16f-88bbbbf867c6"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Security group ID.
- `name` (String) Security group name.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID the security group belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Security group description.
